summary: Listed Tab feature testing completed. All 9 backend API tests passed. All 12 frontend UI tests passed. The new 'Listed' tab renders correctly with 4 tabs (All, Collection, For Sale, Listed), filters work correctly, and listed cards show eBay badge.
passed_tests: BACKEND - GET /api/inventory endpoint accessible and returns items
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory/stats returns all required fields (total_cards, listed, collection_count, for_sale_count)
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory?listed=true returns only listed items (1 card)
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory?category=collection&listed=false returns only non-listed collection items (1 card)
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory?category=for_sale&listed=false returns empty array (0 cards)
BACKEND - GET /api/inventory returns all 2 cards for All tab
BACKEND - Stats counts are accurate and match filtered results
BACKEND - total_cards equals sum of listed + collection_count + for_sale_count
BACKEND - Listed cards have required fields (id, card_name, listed=true)
FRONTEND - 4 tabs render: All (2), Collection (1), For Sale (0), Listed (1)
FRONTEND - Listed stat card shows count of 1
FRONTEND - Listed tab hides Select and Add buttons
FRONTEND - Listed tab shows 1 card with eBay badge
FRONTEND - Collection tab shows 1 card with Col badge
FRONTEND - For Sale tab shows 0 cards
FRONTEND - All tab shows 2 cards total
critical_code_review_comments: Code is well structured with proper tab-based filtering in InventoryModule.jsx
Backend /api/inventory endpoint correctly handles listed and category query params
Backend /api/inventory/stats correctly excludes listed items from collection_count and for_sale_count
Frontend correctly hides Select and Add buttons when activeCategory is 'listed'
eBay badge displays correctly on listed cards in grid view
seed_data_creation: Used existing 2 cards: 1997 Topps Kobe Bryant #171 (listed on eBay), 2012 Panini Kobe Bryant #97 (collection)
context_for_next_testing_agent: Listed Tab feature fully tested. Inventory has 4 tabs: All, Collection, For Sale, Listed. The listed tab filters by listed=true and hides Select/Add buttons. Stats endpoint returns correct counts. Current inventory: 2 cards total (1 listed on eBay, 1 in collection). Key data-testid: tab-all, tab-collection, tab-for_sale, tab-listed, stat-listed, select-mode-btn, add-card-btn.

features_verified.4_Inventory_Tabs: PASS - All, Collection, For Sale, Listed tabs render correctly
features_verified.Listed_Tab_Filter: PASS - Shows only cards with listed=true
features_verified.Collection_Tab_Filter: PASS - Shows only non-listed collection cards
features_verified.For_Sale_Tab_Filter: PASS - Shows 0 cards (no non-listed for_sale items)
features_verified.Hide_Buttons_In_Listed: PASS - Select and Add buttons hidden
features_verified.eBay_Badge: PASS - Listed cards show eBay badge
features_verified.Col_Badge: PASS - Collection cards show Col badge
